about.title: About me
about.subtitle: My story and how I can help you

bio.p1: I'm a full stack developer passionate about creating digital solutions that truly make a difference.
bio.p2: With over a year of experience working with startups and companies, I've learned that the key is to understand the problem before writing a single line of code.
bio.p3: My approach always combines modern technology with user-centered design.

job1.title: Founder & Lead Developer
description: Own digital agency: automation, SEO and web development for dental clinics in Spain
4+ web projects in production (React + Vite + Tailwind + Framer Motion) deployed on Vercel
Mobile-first QR digital menus with animations, allergen filters and i18n
Security: API keys with Serverless Functions, reCAPTCHA, CI/CD pipelines on Vercel

job2.title: Full-Stack Web Developer
description: Complete web app from scratch: Flask + Next.js + MySQL (9 months, end-to-end cycle)
Database modeling (7 tables), REST API, JWT authentication, role-based access control
Admin panel with dashboards, real-time statistics and review system

job3.title: Web Developer / Support Technician
description: Maintenance and optimization of 4 sites (WordPress + Joomla), healthcare sector
Frontend interfaces (HTML5, CSS/Bootstrap, JS) for medical research platform
Medical IoT research for elderly autonomy
